name: Cytotoxic CD4+ T cells eliminate senescent cells by targeting cytomegalovirus antigen
short_name: CMV antigen CD4 T-cell senescent-cell clearance
summary: A Cell study using human skin and ex vivo immune assays to show that cytotoxic CD4 T cells can eliminate HCMV-gB-positive senescent fibroblasts in an HLA-II-dependent manner.
